chapter_title.ar: باب فِي تَسْمِيَةِ مَنْ رَآهُ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 77 – Regarding the naming of the ones who saw him<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/10)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/10)
text: قُلْتُ لِلْعَمْرِيِّ قَدْ مَضَى أَبُو مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ قَدْ مَضَى وَ لَكِنْ قَدْ خَلَّفَ فِيكُمْ مَنْ رَقَبَتُهُ مِثْلُ هَذَا وَ أَشَارَ بِيَدِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Hamdan Al Qalansy who said,

‘I said to Al-Amry, ‘Had Abu Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> passed away?’ So he said: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> has passed away, but he<sup>asws</sup> has left behind among you the one<sup>asws</sup> whose neck is like this’, and he indicated by his hand’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Hamdan al-Qalanisi who has said the following. “I asked al-‘Amri, “Has abu Muhammad (a.s.) passed away?” He said, “Yes, he has passed away but has left behind among you a person (the succeeding Imam) whose neck is like this. He made a sign with his hand (meaning thereby good health and beauty).”
